summary: Excellent audience recording of a stellar late‑80s show highlighted by a soaring Sugaree and an epic Uncle John’s jam.
review: Fans rave about this performance as one of the top Grateful Dead concerts of the ’80s, citing the ripping Sugaree and the marathon Playing > Uncle John’s > Drums > Space > The Wheel sequence as the show’s crown jewels. The audience tape is praised for its vivid crowd ambience and surprisingly clear sound—better than many SBDs—even though a few listeners note minor imperfections.

ai_rating.rationale: All eight reviews are enthusiastic, with an average rating of 4.6; the musical performance is described as outstanding and the audience recording is regarded as unusually clear.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Many reviewers call it one of the best audience recordings, noting vivid crowd noise that adds atmosphere; a few mention slight imperfections but overall clarity is praised.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Energetic, colorful outdoor show with long, flowing jams; the sequence Playing > Uncle John’s > Drums > Space > The Wheel is highlighted as a seamless high point.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Repeatedly praised for great playing and overall vibe (“Jerry was great”).
